title: FMD-001: Find My Device tone — Play-Stop-Play sequence state reset validation
steps: Navigate to: Device → Find My Device
Tap Play — verify tone starts playing
Tap Stop — verify tone stops completely
Tap Play again — verify tone plays on second attempt
expected: Tone plays on first Play. Tone stops cleanly on Stop. Tone plays again on second Play. 🧠 Bug Signature: Actual (If Bug): Second Play produces no audio or a truncated/stuttered tone — indicates tone playback engine fails to reinitialize after Stop command.

title: FMD-002: Find My Device tone — Rapid Play presses causing stacked/overlapping audio
steps: Navigate to: Device → Find My Device
Tap Play rapidly 5 times within 2 seconds (do not tap Stop between presses)
Observe audio output from device
expected: Only one instance of the FMD tone plays at a time. No overlapping, distorted, or stacked audio artifacts. 🧠 Bug Signature: Actual (If Bug): Multiple tone instances play simultaneously creating noise/cacophony — indicates missing debounce or command queuing on Play button.

title: FMD-003: Find My Device tone — Stop button unresponsiveness after rapid Play presses
steps: Navigate to: Device → Find My Device
Tap Play rapidly 5 times within 2 seconds (stacked noise scenario if bug exists)
Tap Stop once
Wait 3 seconds and observe audio
expected: Stop command terminates all audio playback immediately. No residual tone continues. 🧠 Bug Signature: Actual (If Bug): Stop button does not stop the stacked noise — tone continues playing indefinitely with no UI mechanism to silence it, requiring app kill or device reboot.

title: FMD-004: Find My Device tone — Immediate app kill during playback (state sync timing)
steps: Navigate to: Device → Find My Device
Tap Play — verify tone starts
IMMEDIATELY force-kill the app (do not navigate away, do not tap Stop)
Wait 5 seconds
Reopen app and navigate to: Device → Find My Device
expected: Tone stops on the device within 2 seconds of app kill (BT disconnect timeout). On relaunch, FMD UI shows idle state (Play button active, no 'Playing' indicator). 🧠 Bug Signature: Actual (If Bug): Tone continues playing indefinitely on device after app kill, OR app relaunches showing 'Playing' state when no tone is audible — indicates missing lifecycle cleanup.

title: FMD-005: Find My Device tone — App background/foreground lifecycle
steps: Navigate to: Device → Find My Device
Tap Play — verify tone is playing
Press Home button (app backgrounds)
Wait 10 seconds
Reopen app from recent apps
Observe FMD UI state and audio
expected: Tone continues playing while app is backgrounded (FMD is a device-level action). On foreground return, FMD UI still shows 'Playing' state. No duplicate/stacked tone on return. 🧠 Bug Signature: Actual (If Bug): Tone stops when app backgrounds, OR tone doubles/overlaps when app returns to foreground — indicates missing lifecycle state preservation.

title: FMD-006: Find My Device tone — Bluetooth disconnect during playback
steps: Navigate to: Device → Find My Device
Tap Play — verify tone is playing
Disconnect Bluetooth from phone settings or turn off device
Wait 5 seconds
Reconnect Bluetooth
Navigate to: Device → Find My Device
expected: Tone stops immediately on Bluetooth disconnect. On reconnect, FMD UI shows idle state (Play button active). No residual tone plays on reconnect. 🧠 Bug Signature: Actual (If Bug): Tone continues playing on device after disconnect, OR tone auto-restarts on reconnect, OR UI shows 'Playing' state when device is idle.

title: FMD-007: Find My Device tone — Interaction with active phone call
steps: Place or receive an active phone call on the Poly device
While call is active, navigate to: Device → Find My Device
Tap Play
Observe audio behavior on device
expected: FMD tone is suppressed during active call — does not play over the call audio. OR if tone plays, it plays only in the earpiece at low volume and does not disrupt call audio path. After call ends, FMD UI should still show idle state (tone not queued to play after call). 🧠 Bug Signature: Actual (If Bug): Tone plays at full volume over the call, causing audio disruption, OR tone causes call audio to route incorrectly or drop.

title: FMD-008: Find My Device tone — Interaction with media playback
steps: Start media playback (music/podcast) on the Poly device at moderate volume (e.g., 50%)
While media is playing, navigate to: Device → Find My Device
Tap Play
Observe audio behavior
Tap Stop
Observe media audio behavior
expected: FMD tone interrupts/pauses media playback. Tone plays at its designated volume level. After Stop, media playback resumes at previous volume level. 🧠 Bug Signature: Actual (If Bug): Tone plays simultaneously with media (stacked audio), OR media volume is not restored after tone stops, OR media does not resume after tone stops.

title: FMD-009: Find My Device tone — Volume level validation and adjustment during playback
steps: Navigate to: Device → Find My Device
Set device volume to 30%
Tap Play — note perceived loudness of tone
Tap Stop
Set device volume to 80%
Tap Play — note perceived loudness of tone
While tone is playing at 80%, adjust volume down to 30% using device volume buttons
Observe tone volume change
expected: FMD tone volume scales with device volume setting. Tone at 80% is audibly louder than at 30%. Volume adjustment during playback changes tone volume in real-time. 🧠 Bug Signature: Actual (If Bug): Tone plays at a fixed volume regardless of device volume setting, OR volume adjustment during playback does not affect tone volume — indicates FMD bypasses volume mixer.

title: FMD-010: Find My Device tone — Play-Stop-Play with tab navigation between plays
steps: Navigate to: Device → Find My Device
Tap Play — verify tone starts
Tap Stop — verify tone stops
Navigate away to: Device → Audio Settings
Navigate back to: Device → Find My Device
Tap Play
expected: Tone plays on third Play after navigating away and back. FMD state is correctly reset to idle after navigation. 🧠 Bug Signature: Actual (If Bug): Play button is unresponsive or tone fails to play after returning from another settings screen — indicates FMD state is not properly initialized on view re-entry.

title: FMD-011: Find My Device tone — Rapid Play-Stop-Play-Stop cycling (stress test)
steps: Navigate to: Device → Find My Device
Rapidly cycle Play → Stop → Play → Stop → Play → Stop (6 actions within 5 seconds)
Wait 3 seconds
Tap Play one final time and observe
expected: All Stop commands execute cleanly. No audio artifacts, stuttering, or residual tone after final Stop. Final Play produces clean tone. 🧠 Bug Signature: Actual (If Bug): After rapid cycling, Stop becomes unresponsive, OR final Play produces distorted/truncated audio, OR device becomes temporarily unresponsive to further FMD commands.

title: FMD-012: Find My Device tone — Tone timeout / auto-stop behavior
steps: Navigate to: Device → Find My Device
Tap Play — start timer
Do not interact with app or device
Observe when tone stops automatically
expected: Tone auto-stops after a defined timeout period (typically 30-60 seconds depending on device). After auto-stop, FMD UI shows idle state. 🧠 Bug Signature: Actual (If Bug): Tone plays indefinitely with no auto-stop, OR tone stops but UI still shows 'Playing' state, OR tone stops prematurely before timeout.
